scripts.name: Dex Explorer v5
scripts.description: Roblox Studio explorer but locally in game.
scripts.script: loadstring(game:HttpGet('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzerexx/Dex/refs/heads/master/main.lua'))();local m=game.Players.LocalPlayer:GetMouse();local ma=game.CoreGui:WaitForChild('MainMenu').OpenButton.MainFrame.AppsFrame.Container;for _,g in pairs(ma:GetChildren())do if g.Name=='App'and g.Main.Icon.ImageRectOffset==Vector2.new(96,0)then g:Destroy()end end local c=game.CoreGui.MainMenu.OpenButton.MainFrame.AppsFrame.Container local n=c.App:Clone()n.Parent=c local e=false n.Main.AppName.Text='Part Lookup'n.Main.Icon.ImageRectOffset=Vector2.new(96,0)n.Main.Icon.ImageRectSize=Vector2.new(32,32)local function s()n.Main.BackgroundColor3=e and Color3.fromRGB(60,60,60)or Color3.fromRGB(45,45,45)n.Main.Highlight.Visible=e end s()n.Main.MouseEnter:Connect(function()n.Main.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(65,65,65)end)n.Main.MouseLeave:Connect(s)n.Main.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()e=not e s()end)game:GetService('UserInputService').InputBegan:Connect(function(i,p)if not p and e and i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then print(m.Target:GetFullName())end end)

scripts.name: Infinite Yield
scripts.description: Best universal script out there. Best one, no cap.

scripts.name: BABFT Auto Farm (Tween)
scripts.description: Simple auto farm that can be toggled ON/OFF via a button, it's a bit laggy and slow
scripts.script: local Players=game:GetService('Players');local TweenService=game:GetService('TweenService');local p=Players.LocalPlayer;local dir=workspace.BoatStages.NormalStages;local name='CaveStage';local stages=10;local tweenTime=2;local autofarm=false;local running=false;local character,hrp,slide,stageY,touching=false;local gui=Instance.new('ScreenGui');gui.ResetOnSpawn=false;gui.Parent=p.PlayerGui;local button=Instance.new('TextButton');button.Parent=gui;button.Text='Auto Farm: OFF';button.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0);button.Position=UDim2.new(0.01,0,0.01,0);button.Size=UDim2.new(0.08,0,0.05,0);local function setCharacter(char) character=char;hrp=char:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart') end;local function tweenTo(cf) local t=TweenService:Create(hrp,TweenInfo.new(tweenTime,Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),{CFrame=cf});t:Play();t.Completed:Wait() end;local function ensureSlide() if slide then return end;local stage0=dir:WaitForChild(name..1).DarknessPart;stageY=stage0.Position.Y;slide=Instance.new('Part');slide.Size=Vector3.new(100,2,200);slide.Anchored=true;slide.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.new(0,0,300);slide.CFrame=CFrame.new(stage0.Position.X,stageY-3,hrp.Position.Z);slide.Parent=workspace;slide.Touched:Connect(function(h) if h:IsDescendantOf(character) then touching=true end end);slide.TouchEnded:Connect(function(h) if h:IsDescendantOf(character) then touching=false end end) end;local function startFarm() if running or not autofarm then return end;running=true;ensureSlide();local stage0=dir[name..1].DarknessPart;local s10=dir[name..stages].DarknessPart;hrp.CFrame=stage0.CFrame+Vector3.new(0,5,0);task.spawn(function() while autofarm and slide do if not touching then slide.CFrame=CFrame.new(stage0.Position.X,stageY-3,hrp.Position.Z) end;task.wait(0.1) end end);local done=false;local conn;conn=s10.Touched:Connect(function(h) if h:IsDescendantOf(character) and not done then done=true;conn:Disconnect();local chest=dir.TheEnd.GoldenChest.Trigger;local above=CFrame.new(chest.Position.X,hrp.Position.Y,chest.Position.Z);tweenTo(above);local down=CFrame.new(chest.Position.X,chest.Position.Y-10,chest.Position.Z);tweenTo(down);running=false end end) end;button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() autofarm=not autofarm;if autofarm then button.Text='Auto Farm: ON';button.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(0,255,0);startFarm() else button.Text='Auto Farm: OFF';button.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,0,0);if slide then slide:Destroy();slide=nil end end end);p.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(c) setCharacter(c);running=false;if autofarm then task.wait(0.25);startFarm() end end);if p.Character then setCharacter(p.Character) end

scripts.name: BABFT Auto Farm
scripts.description: Simple optimized auto farm, cannot be stopped.
scripts.script: local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local v=0 local slop=false local pos=game.Workspace.BoatStages.NormalStages local chest=game.Workspace.BoatStages.NormalStages.TheEnd.GoldenChest.Trigger p.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(c) stop=true wait(3) stop=false v=0 local hrp=c:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart') hrp.Anchored=true while true do if stop then break end wait(2.2) v=v+1 if v==5 then c:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(chest.CFrame) hrp.Anchored=false wait(0.3) elseif v==11 then break end local n=pos:FindFirstChild('CaveStage'..tostring(v)) and pos:FindFirstChild('CaveStage'..tostring(v)).DarknessPart if n then c:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(n.CFrame-Vector3.new(0,0,500)) hrp.Anchored=false wait(0.1) hrp.Anchored=true end end end) p.Character.Humanoid.Health=0

scripts.name: FE Anim Player
scripts.description: Plays any animation you want using a KeyframeSequence in JSON format.
scripts.script: local plr=game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer;local chr=plr.Character or plr.CharacterAdded:Wait();local hum=chr:WaitForChild('Humanoid');local cTrack;local playing=false;local clicked=false;local g=Instance.new('ScreenGui');g.ResetOnSpawn=false;g.Parent=plr:WaitForChild('PlayerGui');local f=Instance.new('Frame');f.Size=UDim2.new(0,360,0,220);f.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,-180,0.5,-110);f.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(35,35,35);f.ClipsDescendants=true;f.Active=true;f.Draggable=true;f.Selectable=true;f.SizeConstraint=Enum.SizeConstraint.RelativeYY;f.Style=Enum.FrameStyle.DropShadow;f.Parent=g;local title=Instance.new('TextLabel');title.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,32);title.BackgroundTransparency=1;title.Text='FE Animation Player';title.Font=Enum.Font.SourceSansBold;title.TextSize=22;title.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);title.Parent=f;local label=Instance.new('TextLabel');label.Position=UDim2.new(0,10,0,40);label.Size=UDim2.new(1,-20,0,16);label.BackgroundTransparency=1;label.Text='Paste your JSON code below';label.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);label.TextScaled=true;label.Parent=f;local box=Instance.new('TextBox');box.Position=UDim2.new(0,10,0,65);box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-20,0,80);box.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(100,100,100);box.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);box.ClearTextOnFocus=false;box.Transparency=0.5;box.TextWrapped=true;box.MultiLine=true;box.Text='';box.Font=Enum.Font.Code;box.TextSize=15;box.Parent=f;local pb=Instance.new('TextButton');pb.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,10,1,-55);pb.Size=UDim2.new(0,100,0,32);pb.Text='Play';pb.TextSize=18;pb.Font=Enum.Font.SourceSansBold;pb.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);pb.Style=Enum.ButtonStyle.RobloxRoundDefaultButton;pb.Parent=f;local mb=Instance.new('TextButton');mb.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,-110,1,-55);mb.Size=UDim2.new(0,100,0,32);mb.Text='More';mb.TextSize=18;mb.Font=Enum.Font.SourceSansBold;mb.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);mb.Style=Enum.ButtonStyle.RobloxRoundDefaultButton;mb.Parent=f;local cb=Instance.new('TextButton');cb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0);cb.Size=UDim2.new(0,32,0,32);cb.Text='X';cb.TextSize=18;cb.Font=Enum.Font.SourceSansBold;cb.TextColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1);cb.Style=Enum.ButtonStyle.RobloxRoundDefaultButton;cb.Parent=f;local fo=Instance.new('TextLabel');fo.Size=UDim2.new(1,-20,0,18);fo.Position=UDim2.new(0,10,1,-20);fo.BackgroundTransparency=1;fo.Text='Made by Skira / github.com/solal0 / discord.gg/5znwBsuEpf';fo.TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(180,180,180);fo.TextScaled=true;fo.Parent=f;local function build(d,p)local po=Instance.new('Pose');po.Name=d.n;local pos,rot=d.p,d.r;po.CFrame=CFrame.new(pos[1],pos[2],pos[3])*CFrame.Angles(math.rad(rot[1]),math.rad(rot[2]),math.rad(rot[3]));po.Weight=d.w or 1;po.Parent=p;if d.ch then for _,c in ipairs(d.ch) do build(c,po) end end end;local function play(a,json)if cTrack then cTrack:Stop();cTrack:Destroy();cTrack=nil end;if a then local decoded;local ok,err=pcall(function()decoded=game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONDecode(json)end);if not ok or type(decoded)~='table' or not decoded.k then warn('Invalid JSON:',err);return end;local seq=Instance.new('KeyframeSequence');for _,kf in ipairs(decoded.k) do local keyframe=Instance.new('Keyframe');keyframe.Time=kf.t;for _,pose in ipairs(kf.p) do build(pose,keyframe) end;keyframe.Parent=seq end;local Id=game:GetService('KeyframeSequenceProvider'):RegisterKeyframeSequence(seq);local anim=Instance.new('Animation');anim.AnimationId=Id;cTrack=hum:LoadAnimation(anim);cTrack:Play()end end;pb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()playing=not playing;play(playing,box.Text);pb.Text=playing and 'Stop' or 'Play'end);mb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()if clicked then return end;clicked=true;mb.Text='.gg/5znwBsuEpf';task.spawn(function()task.wait(2);mb.Text='More';clicked=false end)end);cb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()g:Destroy()end)
